title: Tabs
description: Tabs organize content into multiple panels where only one panel is visible at a time.
whenToUse: To switch between related views of the same content. When all tabs belong to the same context.
whenNotToUse: For step-by-step flows, use a wizard instead. For navigation between pages, use nav.

keyboard.action: Move focus into/out of the tab list

_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Use role="tablist" on the container and role="tab" on each tab button. aria-selected indicates the active tab.
